name: @firstpick/pi-skill-design-patterns
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill when choosing patterns, designing traits/interfaces/components, deciding abstraction boundaries, evaluating dependency injection/callbacks, or comparing implementation approaches in Rust, TypeScript/React, or Django/Python.
description_zh: 代理在选择模式、设计特征/接口/组件、决定抽象边界、评估依赖注入/回调或比较 Rust、TypeScript/React 或 Django/Python 中的实现方法时应调用此技能。
